chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.S-155 OF 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING OF CASE 1. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 12.03.2025 Mr. Mohammad Hanif Advocates for the Petitioners alongwith Petitioners SI Meerten of PS Sharafi Goth & Mansoor Ali Bozdar DSP/SDPO Quaidabad -x-x-x-x-x-x- Petitioners through instant petition have sought indulgence of this Court to direct the official respondents to provide protection as the private respondents No.4 & 5 are harassing as they have annoyed due to their unceremonial marriage. None has appeared from the side of respondents No.4 & 5 and statement has been filed by the respondents No.2 & 3 stating therein that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioners and they will provide them protection in accordance with law as and when required. Learned counsel for the petitioners prays that since the private respondents are annoyed and can cause harm to the petitioners as they have contracted marriage with their freewill, therefore, direction for the just protection may be issued. Needless to say that the official respondents are under the obligation to protect life and liberty of the every individual. In such circumstances, the official respondents are directed to ensure that no harm is caused to the Petitioners and ensure their protection in accordance with law. Petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E MUSHARRAF ALI
